about_subtitle: Build code with your hands — a new way to learn programming in VR/MR
about_desc: CodingPuzzle is a VR/MR programming learning app for Meta Quest. Based on freeCodeCamp's open-source curriculum, you learn by assembling code blocks in a puzzle format within VR/MR space. Perfect for beginners — learn intuitively by moving your hands, no prior experience needed.
about_f1: Puzzle-style code building in VR/MR using controllers or hand tracking
about_p1: One step of puzzle-style coding is available for free every day.
about_p2: With a subscription ($7.99/month or $59.99/year), you get unlimited access to all courses and steps with no daily limit.
about_p3: All subscriptions include a 7-day free trial.
howto_step1: Choose from HTML, CSS, JavaScript, or Python on the course selection screen.
howto_step2: Each course contains multiple steps (workshops, lectures, quizzes). Select a step to begin.
howto_step3: Code blocks float in front of you. Point at a block with your controller or hand and select it to place it in the correct position in the editor.
howto_step4: For HTML/CSS courses, a live preview panel shows how your code renders. Complete all lines to advance to the next exercise.
howto_c1: Controller trigger or hand pinch: Select blocks

privacy_intro: Welcome to CodingPuzzle. This 3D application is developed and operated by yt-Studio ("we," "us," or "our"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
privacy_p1a: CodingPuzzle does not require user registration, so we do not collect personally identifiable information (PII) such as your name, email address, or contact details.
privacy_p1b: We may collect non-personally identifiable device information (such as device model and operating system version) solely to ensure functionality and performance. This information cannot be used to identify individual users.
privacy_p1c: We do not collect any application usage data that can be used to identify individuals.
privacy_u1: To provide, maintain, and improve CodingPuzzle
privacy_u2: To respond to user support requests and resolve technical issues
privacy_u3: To send important notifications about the app
privacy_p3: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share non-personally identifiable information with service providers only as necessary to operate and maintain the app.
privacy_p4: We implement reasonable and appropriate measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy_p5: You have the right to access, correct, or delete any data we may have collected. Contact us at the email below. We will respond within 30 days.
privacy_p6: To request data deletion, email us at yuki22683@gmail.com with subject: "Data Deletion Request - CodingPuzzle". Since we do not collect PII by default, we may not be able to associate data with specific users.
privacy_p7: CodingPuzzle is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child's information has been collected, please contact us immediately.
privacy_p8: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The most current version will always be available on this page.
privacy_p9: If you have any questions, please contact us:
